decisions.MW-001: Eval model lazy init in memory module
decisions.MW-002: Convention-based module loading with config allowlist
decisions.MW-005: System prompt injection only (no extra search)
decisions.MW-009: Module injects guidance, identity.md can override
decisions.MW-012: Eval model falls back to agent's LLM config
decisions.MW-014: PII handled in ArcLLM, not memory module
decisions.MW-016: Unit tests for wiring, one integration test for full flow

open_questions_resolved: Convention loader error handling → Tiered (fail critical, warn optional)
Date range filtering → SQLite FTS5 UNINDEXED columns
notes: Memory system fully built (423 tests, 93.67% coverage) but 5 gaps prevent it from working
Key architectural insight: session owns context (MW-008) solves compaction orchestration cleanly
OpenClaw pre-compaction flush pattern adopted for zero information loss
Convention loader (MW-007) replaces hardcoded _register_modules() in agent.py
ModuleContext (MW-004) is a breaking change to Module protocol but low blast radius (1 module)
Deepening resolved all 3 open questions with concrete implementation strategies
OpenClaw bug #5457 (stale token counts) → asyncio.Lock() on context during compaction
FTS5 UNINDEXED columns eliminate need for JOINs in date-filtered search (10-30ms)
